channel.title: AI Benefits vs Ethical Risks on Fatma Profile
channel.description: Recent content in AI Benefits vs Ethical Risks on Fatma Profile

item.title: AI: Benefits vs Ethical Risks
item.description:
Introduction

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is used in many areas today, from policing to hiring. While AI can make tasks faster and more efficient, it also raises ethical concerns such as privacy, fairness, and accountability. This report looks at whether the benefits of AI are greater than the ethical risks.

Key Points

AI is widely used today

AI technologies are used in many industries and public services.

For example, the Toronto Police Service has explored using facial recognition technology to help identify suspects.
